releaseNotes:
• Program guide stays current: the app now refreshes the EPG on launch when the schedule has run out, and refreshing a source also refreshes its guide — so "On now" and the guide grid keep showing live data instead of going blank.
• TV search: after you type, press Down to jump straight to the first result card.
• TV Live guide: hold OK/Select on a channel to open its menu — including "Open in Multi-view" — without needing a touchscreen.
